sql.query: SELECT v.id,v.viewName,v.viewType FROM tbl_board_views v WHERE v.tenantId=:tenantId AND v.templateId IS NULL AND v.isDefault=1 AND (v.userId=:userId OR v.userId IS NULL) ORDER BY CASE WHEN v.userId=:userId2 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,CASE v.viewType WHEN 'personal' THEN 0 WHEN 'tenant' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END LIMIT 1
SELECT c.fieldKey,c.columnLabel,c.isVisible,c.sortOrder,c.width FROM tbl_board_view_columns c WHERE c.boardViewId=:viewId ORDER BY c.sortOrder,c.id
